message:
test(dir,xattr): add 23 edge-case tests for dir entry and xattr lifecycle paths

ffs-dir: 12 new tests (10→22) covering add/remove validation, htree operations,
alignment, and slot reuse. ffs-xattr: 11 new tests (8→19) covering namespace
parsing, permission enforcement, inline multi-xattr, and update-in-place.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
